entry.title: IDC FA852612D0001 (A00092) awarded to BOEING COMPANY, THE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE CONTRACT SHALL PROVIDE SUPPORT AND SUSTAINMENT SERVICES TO THE GOVERNMENT PRODUCT SUPPORT MANAGER (PSM) FOR THE C-17 WEAPON SYSTEM. SUPPORT SHALL INCLUDE, BUT NOT BE LIMITED TO: PROGRAM MANAGEMENT; SUSTAINING LOGISTICS; MATERIAL AND EQUIPMENT MANAGEMENT; SUSTAINING ENGINEERING; QUALITY ASSURANCE; DEPOT LEVEL AIRCRAFT MAINTENANCE AND MODIFICATIONS; F117 PROPULSION SYSTEM MANAGEMENT; LONG-TERM SUSTAINMENT (LTS) PLANNING; FIELD SERVICES, UNIQUE FOREIGN MILITARY CUSTOMER SERVICES, AND AIR LOGISTICS CENTER PARTNERING SUPPORT FOR THE WORLDWIDE FLEET OF THE C-17 AIRCRAFT THROUGH THE VIRTUAL FLEET CONCEPT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
